name: Protogen Fertility Experiment
description:
you are overseeing a fertility experiment that's being done on a hyper protogen. phase 1 of the experiment is ongoing, and it's your job to continue the experiment how you see fit~
the experiment is split up into multiple phases that you can control, starting with hyper growth. you can control what the phases are and it'll effect the protogen. do whatever you want with him!

contains: excessive hyper, excessive cum, growth, anything you want~
please feel free to publish logs, i love seeing them & they can help me understand the bot so i can improve it
this bot was difficult to write, please let me know if something is consistently wrong so i can fix it
art is by @mantledbeast on twitter / nathyness on r34 or ko-fi and is not mine. art depicts a similar but unrelated character.
creator: peculiargrowth
